version.description: Schema version. Increment when the shape changes so the CLI can warn about stale files.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in UIs and docs (e.g. 'Dashboard')

description.description: One-sentence description of what the playbook demonstrates

intent.description: Signals that identify when an AI agent should recommend this playbook based on user intent

items.description: A natural-language phrase that signals this playbook

triggers.description: Natural-language phrases that indicate a user wants this playbook (e.g. 'dashboard', 'analytics', 'admin panel')

summary.description: One-sentence directive for the LLM: 'When the user asks for X, refer to the AgnosticUI Y Playbook.'

recipe.description: Structural recipe describing how to build this UI pattern using AgnosticUI components

layout.description: Plain-English description of the page layout skeleton

components.description: AgnosticUI components used in this playbook and the role each plays

items.description: A single AgnosticUI component entry specifying its name and role in the playbook

role.description: What this component does in this specific playbook

notes.description: Optional implementation hints. Include 1-2 small JSON snippets as 'syntax flavor' to give the LLM enough context to generate correct AgNode graphs without requiring a full sampleGraph.
